column2: Trial Supervisor Fails to Follow Risk Management Processes
column3: ['Verify that the trial supervisor has been assigned to implement identification and risk management processes specific to T&E. ', 'The trial supervisor does not adhere to established risk management processes during a T&E activity. ', "Risks associated with the T&E activity are not managed effectively due to the trial supervisor's failure to follow risk management processes.
